posts.author: SpinningMyHead (HeadSpinner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Creating an automation to create standard subitems when an item is created.

Item A is created
automated created subitems
A1, A2, A3, A4 ETC

A4 is dependent on A3 which is dependent on A2, and A2 is dependent on A1

how is the dependency column selected in the automation phase? Can’t find the option of it being dependent on the recently created item A.
Thx

ALSO, when there is a dependency column, the automation to create A1, A2, A3 A4 does not work… It only works when the dependency column is deleted.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

It looks like we might need to take a closer look at your automation workflow to understand how the dependency automation flow is interacting with your subitem creation automation recipe and preventing it.

Would you reach out to us here so we can figure this out together?
